jobs.name: FINN bilvarsel (el + bensin-kjede)
jobs.prompt:
Du skal lage en FINN bilvarsel-side for Erik som viser aktuelle bilannonser.

VIKTIG: Denne siden eksisterer allerede på here.now med slug `summit-lichen-sntr`. state.json ligger i workdir/.herenow/. Bruk --slug ved oppdatering.

Steg for steg:

1. KJØR DATAINNSAMLING:
   ```bash
   python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/finn_bilvarsel.py 2>/dev/null > /home/erik/.hermes/cron/finn-bilvarsel/data.json
   ```
   Les JSON-output. Hver annonse har: id, title, link, desc, meta, kind (elbil/bensin), price, first_seen (ISO-dato), estimates (60/84/96 mnd), fits_budget (bool).

2. LAG HTML i /home/erik/.hermes/cron/finn-bilvarsel/index.html:

   Designkrav:
   - **DAGSEPARATORER**: Grupper annonsene etter dato (fra first_seen). Hver dag skal ha en tydelig overskrift/seksjon med dato i norsk format (f.eks. "12. juni 2026 · 4 annonser") og en horisontal linje eller farget bunnlinje som skiller dagene. Nyeste dag øverst.
   - **BILDER**: Bildene må være STORE nok til å se hele bilen. Fjern max-height-begrensning på .img-wrap. La bildene vises i full bredde uten å bli beskåret. Bruk width:100%, height:auto, og IKKE max-height eller object-fit:cover som beskjærer.
   - **TESLA MODEL 3**: Hvis noen annonser er Tesla Model 3, vis dem i en egen seksjon øverst med blå overskrift "⚡ Tesla Model 3"
   - Mørkt tema (#0d1117), mobilvennlig, self-contained (ingen eksterne avhengigheter)
   - Hvert annonsekort viser: ✅/⚠️ budsjettstatus, tittel (klikkbar lenke), type, pris i kr med mellomrom, månedskostnad 5/7/8 år (50k egenkapital, 7% rente), meta, beskrivelse, bilde
   - Øverst: tittel "🚗 FINN Bilvarsel – {dato}", generert-tidspunkt, antall annonser
   - Bruk inline CSS i <style> og JavaScript for å rendere annonsene (samme mønster som før, men med first_seen-dato på hver annonse)

3. SLETT data.json før publisering:
   ```bash
   rm /home/erik/.hermes/cron/finn-bilvarsel/data.json
   ```

4. PUBLISER til here.now (NB: cd til workdir, og INGEN trailing slash på stien!):
   ```bash
   cd /home/erik/.hermes/cron/finn-bilvarsel
   bash ~/.hermes/skills/productivity/here-now/scripts/publish.sh /home/erik/.hermes/cron/finn-bilvarsel --slug summit-lichen-sntr --client hermes --title "FINN Bilvarsel - $(date +%d.%m.%Y)"
   ```

5. DELIVERY: Kun URL + én linje teaser:
   🚗 **FINN Bilvarsel – 12. juni 2026**
   https://summit-lichen-sntr.here.now/
   16 annonser fordelt på 3 dager (elbil + bensin registerkjede)

jobs.name: Sjekk lyskorn.no ledig

jobs.name: AI Model Daily Briefing
jobs.prompt:
Your task: Produce a daily AI model news briefing in Norwegian, publish it as a here.now page, and deliver the link.

SKILL: The 'here-now' skill is loaded. It provides the publish.sh script.

WORKDIR: Use /home/erik/Projects/ai-daily-briefing/ as working directory. The .herenow/state.json file is there with the slug and API key for permanent publishing.

SLUG: The slug is "whimsy-vow-vjzk" — use --slug whimsy-vow-vjzk when publishing to update the existing page at https://whimsy-vow-vjzk.here.now/ instead of creating a new one.

FRESHNESS RULES (critical):
- Only include news from the LAST 24-48 HOURS. Discard anything older than 2 days.
- This page is UPDATED DAILY with fresh content. Do NOT re-report news that was covered in previous briefings — every day should have fresh news only.
- If nothing new has happened since last time, say "Ingen store nyheter siste døgn" instead of recycling old news.
- When in doubt about whether something is new, err on the side of excluding it.

STEP 1 — Research
Search the web for the LATEST news about AI models — with a strong focus on Chinese AI models.

1. Search for Chinese AI model news — DeepSeek (all versions), Qwen (Alibaba), Kimi (Moonshot AI), Baidu ERNIE, Zhipu GLM/ChatGLM, ByteDance (Doubao/Seed), Baichuan, Yi (01.AI), SenseTime SenseNova, StepFun (MiniMax), Alibaba's Tongyi, Huawei's Pangu, Tencent's Hunyuan, and any new/emerging Chinese models. Include open-source releases, benchmark results, new architectures, API pricing changes, and regulatory news.

2. Search for general AI model news — OpenAI (GPT, o-series), Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini, Gemma), Meta (Llama), Mistral, xAI (Grok), and other notable models.

3. Check for new papers on arXiv relevant to model architecture, training efficiency, or benchmarks.

Focus on news from the last 24-48 hours ONLY. If nothing major happened in a category, skip it rather than padding.

STEP 2 — Create the HTML page
Overwrite /home/erik/Projects/ai-daily-briefing/index.html with a self-contained, dark-themed, mobile-friendly HTML page.

LAYOUT (top to bottom):
1. Date (e.g. "13. juni 2026") and header
2. 📊 Kort oppsummert — 1-2 sentence bottom line (AT THE TOP, not at the bottom)
3. 🇨🇳 Kinesiske AI-modeller — bullet points with dates
4. 🌍 Globale AI-modeller — bullet points with dates
5. 📄 Interessante papers — with dates
6. Footer

EACH news entry MUST include the date in format "12. juni" so the user can see how fresh it is. Example:
- **DeepSeek R3** (12. juni) — 685B MoE med MIT-lisens. Hevdes å slå GPT-4.5 på resonnering.

Cite sources with URLs where possible. Keep it concise — aim for 5-10 bullet points total unless there's exceptional news.

If there is genuinely nothing new to report, just say so instead of padding with old news.

STEP 3 — Publish to here.now
Publish the directory using the publish.sh script:
```bash
cd /home/erik/Projects/ai-daily-briefing
PUBLISH="$HERMES_SKILL_DIR/scripts/publish.sh"
bash "$PUBLISH" /home/erik/Projects/ai-daily-briefing --slug whimsy-vow-vjzk --client hermes --title "AI Model Daily Briefing - $(date +%d.%m.%Y)"
```
This updates the existing page at https://whimsy-vow-vjzk.here.now/ rather than creating a new URL.

STEP 4 — Deliver
Your final response to the user should ONLY contain:
- A link to the here.now page
- The date
- A very short 1-sentence summary of the top news (in Norwegian)

Do NOT post the full briefing content in Discord — that's what the here.now page is for. Just the link and a teaser.

EXAMPLE OUTPUT:
🧠 **AI Model Daily Briefing — 12. juni 2026**
https://whimsy-vow-vjzk.here.now/
DeepSeek slapp R3, og OpenAI lanserte GPT-5.
